reason: The aimed bite is a LIVE witness by design: the fixture's PR body cites a sentinel-nonexistent issue and the check must resolve it against the real issue API (a 404 -> 'isn't a real engine-tracked issue'). Without a repository and token the check deliberately degrades to its honest local no-op, which can never carry the aimed token — so a token-less local rehearsal red-flagged the harness, not the check (#531). CI provides both variables and this declaration is ignored there; the live witness stays the enforced proof.
